title: hieracium stellidorsum
intro: Hieracium stellidorsum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion-like plants of the genus Hieracium. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and skin conditions, due to its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hieracium stellidorsum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Hieracium stellidorsum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or internally to promote overall well-being.
